ShortDescription.Value: Basic formulas for public transport related modules using Write Everywhere

Publish.LongDescription:
**README**
This is the WE Transport Formula Module (WE_TFM), formerly known as PlatformSwitcher. All references and code have been updated to reflect the new project name.
Publish.ChangeLog:
**CHANGELOG**
- Project renamed from PlatformSwitcher to WE_TFM (WE Transport Formula Module) - All namespaces, classes, and references updated accordingly
